parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(trim($1), '')::text  AS email,
    NULLIF(trim($8), '')::text  AS first_name,
    NULLIF(trim($9), '')::text  AS last_name,
    NULLIF(trim($10), '')::text AS phone
),
existing AS (
  SELECT m.member_id
  FROM public.members m
  JOIN input i ON i.email IS NOT NULL
  WHERE lower(m.email) = lower(i.email)
  LIMIT 1
),
created AS (
  INSERT INTO public.members (email, first_name, last_name, phone, status, created_at)
  SELECT
    i.email,
    COALESCE(i.first_name, ''),
    COALESCE(i.last_name, ''),
    i.phone,
    'active',
    now()
  FROM input i
  WHERE i.email IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING member_id
),
member AS (
  SELECT member_id FROM existing
  UNION ALL
  SELECT member_id FROM created
  LIMIT 1
),
ins AS (
  INSERT INTO public.donations (
    member_id,
    provider,
    provider_reference,
    amount_cents,
    currency,
    donated_at,
    notes,
    status
  )
  SELECT
    (SELECT member_id FROM member),
    'givebutter',
    $2,
    $3,
    COALESCE($4, 'USD'),
    CASE WHEN $5 IS NULL OR $5 = '' THEN NULL ELSE $5::timestamptz END,
    $6,
    'verified'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public.donations d
    WHERE d.provider = 'givebutter' AND d.provider_reference = $2
  )
  RETURNING donation_id
),
audit AS (
  INSERT INTO public.audit_log (actor, action, entity_type, entity_id, details)
  SELECT
    'givebutter',
    'donation.verified',
    'donation',
    ins.donation_id::text,
    $7::jsonb
  FROM ins
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT ins.donation_id
FROM ins;
